user.title: Wyze credentials
user.description: Create a Key ID and API Key at the Wyze developer console. Paste carefully (no leading/trailing spaces).

data.totp: Base32 TOTP secret (not the 6-digit code). Leave blank if unused.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Simple Wyze Vac
reauth_confirm.description: Wyze rejected the stored credentials. Update password and regenerate API Key ID / API Key if needed.

error.auth_error: Login failed. Check username/password, Key ID, API Key, and TOTP. Regenerate API keys at the Wyze developer console if needed.
